– Added: Bookmark mode now supports bookmark groups.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: Issue where links were missing the ! symbol when dragging media files from the staging area.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Press Ctrl+Alt to open notes in split screen
- Changed the "New Tab" option for opening notes to switch focus to the existing tab if the same note is already open instead of opening a new tab
- Optimized the top button interface on mobile

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Option to configure how notes are opened.
- Added: Support custom note color.
- Fixed: Bug where note property title and summary fields would fail to read when custom names were present.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Optimized top button interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - match nested tags #69

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Automatically load the next image when the first image in the note fails to load.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: Change the way the staging area is stored to prevent it from being cleared after closing the panel.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: An issue where Alt+Right key would not work when it conflicted with an Obsidian shortcut.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: An issue where Alt+Left key would not work when it conflicted with an Obsidian shortcut. #65

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Allow direct input of folder name when creating a new folder #64

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Optimize the search function interface.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Ignore Ctrl key clicks when clicking on Breadcrumb.
- Fixed: CSS errors

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Issue where Ctrl+Click in the sidebar would easily trigger Ctrl+hover at the same time.
- Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Add new note option to folders
- Fixed: Issue where Ctrl+Click on items was not working
- Fixed: Missing translations
- Optimized item click behavior in Explorer

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Hovering the mouse over an item and pressing Ctrl will display the note in grid view.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Sub-options in Custom Mode can now be dragged to reorder and collapsed.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Bug where the root directory could not display the submenu for subdirectories.
- Added: Added a right-click option to join the staging area on mobile devices.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fix the method for retrieving Breadcrumb paths.
- Support base and canvas in shortcut files.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed drag-and-drop file issues.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed drag-and-drop file issues.
- Refactored the method for retrieving the Breadcrumb path.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Enhance drag-and-drop functionality to accept files dragged from core file browsers.
- Fix the item expansion behavior of Explorer.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added a Staging Area option in Explorer View.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Pressing Enter while searching in Explorer incorrectly opens the selected file
- Fixed: Parsing error for JavaScript expressions in custom-mode fields

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Change: Folder display mode updated to three options
- Fixed: Issue where the search state was not correctly remembered

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Export functionality not working on mobile devices
- Fixed: Using the search function in Explorer on mobile devices causes the keyboard to repeatedly reopen

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Explorer View
- Operation change: Alt + Click is now used for multi-select file operation, aligning with the behavior of Obsidian's file explorer. The original "show note" function has been moved to the right-click menu.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: Added shortcut files not being saved in the current folder

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Type text to directly enter search when opening grid view location selector.
- Added: Default settings for search options.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Improved: Enhanced history feature
- Added: Search shortcuts now include search scope configuration options
- Fixed: Thumbnail preview now supports AVIF image format

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: A bug where shortcut files would become invalid when the "Show notes directly on the grid view" feature was enabled.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Shortcut feature now includes search and URL options.
- Fixed: Bug where history was missing in certain situations.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed a bug where the grid view was not updating after returning to the history.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Option to display folders directly in the grid view or via a dropdown menu
- Added: History can now record search states

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added support for JavaScript expressions in custom-mode fields
- Added an option to search filenames only
- Fixed a bug where sorting in the global search didn’t work when not in folder mode

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: In Custom Mode, you can use the “|” symbol to define field aliases (for example, “created_date|Created Date”).
- Fixed: Ignored folders were not being taken into account when selecting a location.
- Fixed: The search path is now displayed as the full path when selecting a location.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: An error where the default sorting in custom mode was not working.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Improved search capabilities

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Prevent PDFs from opening directly in grid view
- Fixed: Shortened preview text length in search results (#51)
- Fixed: Custom Mode shortcuts not showing icons
- Fixed: Translation errors and CSS bugs

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Shortcut functionality
- Added: Ability to right-click on a note link and search for the linked note
- Fixed: CSS errors

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Now displaying all tags
- Added swipe functionality for viewing images on mobile devices
- Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added support for thumbnails using the `banner: https://image.com/image.jpg` format
- Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Display notes directly in grid view
- Improved: Enhanced image viewing interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Change the behavior of Ctrl-click multi-selection to only be effective when 2 or more items are selected, to avoid interfering with opening notes.
- Fixed: CSS errors.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Settings now include export and import options
- Added: Individual date separator and label toggle options
- Added: Folder move function
- Fixed: Bug where deleting sub-options in custom mode affects the default dataviewCode content
- Optimized the interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: "Modified Time" and "Created Time" settings now support multiple field names (comma-separated).
- Added: Back button, allowing navigation to the previous mode or previous folder.
- Fixed: CSS errors.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Ctrl+right-click on a folder to open in a new grid view
- Added: Right-click menu on tab icon to hide top elements
- Added: Ability to pause grid view updates by pinning tabs
- Added: Each mode now has its own CSS class:

`ge-mode-custom`
`ge-mode-bookmarks`
`ge-mode-search`
`ge-mode-backlinks`
`ge-mode-outgoinglinks`
`ge-mode-all-files`
`ge-mode-recent-files`
`ge-mode-random-note`
`ge-mode-tasks`
`ge-mode-folder`

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Folder mode can display the full path
- Added: Support for dragging files to the current folder
- Fixed: Bug where subfolders could not be dragged when there were no files in the folder

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Custom mode now supports displaying frontmatter field values
- Added: Pinned items now have a CSS class `.ge-grid-item.ge-pinned`
- Optimized interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Quick selection now supports custom mode options
- Added: Image position setting for vertical cards
- Fixed: Sorting function selection issues
- Fixed: On iOS, loading a large number of files would cause other functions to become unresponsive
- Fixed: Added missing vertical card item height setting

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Vertical card style #43 
- Optimized the speed of listing files

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Custom mode now includes sub-option functionality.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Refactor and optimize the interface.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Adjust default settings
- Added: Click on the top area to scroll to the top

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: Added: Setting to intercept note navigation bar click events, allowing paths in the navigation bar to be opened with GridView.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Custom mode now supports sorting from both its own settings and the menu

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Task mode can now use the Dataview Plugin API to find tasks.
- Optimize the folder selecting UI 改進文件夾選擇UI #40

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Add quick access folder setting and command and option to use it as "New Tab" view #37
- Added: Custom mode now includes export and import functions, as well as a display toggle.
- Fixed: Issue where the history record did not correctly display the custom mode name.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: Added: Custom mode that allows using dataviewjs to define the logic for listing files.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Search function now correctly finds all tags
- Fixed: Intercepted tag click events that were preventing the delete button in the properties panel from working
- Fixed: Added support for dragging and dropping files onto Canvas
- Enhanced: Improved the search input interface

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Setting to intercept tag click events, allowing tags in notes to be opened with GridView.
- Added: Right-click menu on tags in grid items to add or remove tags from search.
- Fixed: Bug where the selection state was not cleared after deleting a note.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Tag autocomplete in the search function.
- Fixed: Bug where `#` was missing when clicking on a tag.
- Improved the logic of the file watcher.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Enhanced ability to search for tags.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Task mode can now use the Tasks Plugin API to find tasks.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Improved UI

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Folder notes can be set to be pinned or hidden.
- Added: CSS class `.ge-grid-item.ge-foldernote` for folder notes.
- The "Go to Parent Folder" buttons are now merged into one, and the display setting for the "Go to Parent Folder" button has been removed.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Task Mode
- Changed "Go to Parent Folder" option to display the folder path

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed: Bug where folder notes were incorrectly created for notes without the pin functionality enabled

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Right-clicking a folder in the context menu now allows you to open the folder in a new grid view

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Customize default icons for folders
- Added: Use the `summary` field in frontmatter to set the summary (field name can be specified in settings)
- Added: Temporarily display ignored folders (open the right-click menu in the blank area of the top button bar)
- Fixed: Issue where the `title` field was not working with default values

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
Added: Note pinning feature
    Added: Minimized mode for individual notes

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Note pinning feature
- Added: Minimized mode for individual notes

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Improved summary extraction logic

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Minimize mode (right-click on the blank area of the top buttons)
- Added: Option to show CodeBlock in summary
- Fixed: Keyboard navigation affecting input in Modal windows
- Fixed: Incorrect behavior of the keyboard navigation when the date separator is enabled

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Folder note icon setting

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: GridView search option to tag-wrangler tag right-click menu

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Right-click on the navigation bar to open the folder note for the current folder
- Fixed: Incorrect behavior of the date separator in recent files mode

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Use frontmatter's title field to set the title

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: Added: Separator between folders and files

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Ukrainian and Russian translations

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added: Support for media links inside code blocks in Outgoing Link Mode

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Outgoing Link Mode
- Added: Numerical sorting support for Name sorting mode

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed: Issue with date separator display on iOS
- Fixed: Ctrl+click not opening notes in new tabs

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Display tags and date in the grid
- Added: Support for multiple keywords in search
- Fixed: Search current location not working

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Search selected text via right-click menu
- Fixed: Issue with Ctrl+click to open notes not working

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Setting the number of notes to display for recent files and random notes
- Changed: Options for searching images and videos have been moved to the search window

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Backlink Mode is now automatically updated when opening a note.
- Added: Ability to add and delete folders (right-click on the add note icon).

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Support for sorting by note's metadata date
- Added: Location history feature (right-click on the icon)
- Added: Command to open current note in recent files mode

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Support for multi-file selection
- Added: Setting colors for folders and notes

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Recent Files Mode
- Fixed: Keyboard selection of folders was conflicting with the Grid View keyboard navigation.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Folder notes can now be used to specify the sorting method for folders.
- Fixed: Random Note mode was still including images and videos even when image and video display was disabled.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Clicking the blank area of the top button now scrolls the grid container to the top.
- Added: The command to open the current note in GridView now automatically jumps to the note's position.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: Support for music files.
- Added: Customizable file extension filtering (to specify which file types to display).

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Fixed an issue where video positioning was incorrect.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue where images were displayed incorrectly after zooming in.
- Added support for opening notes with the middle mouse button (equivalent to Ctrl+Left Click).
- In Random Note mode, added an option to switch between "Notes Only" and "Include Images/Videos".

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added: "Ignore this folder" option in the folder's right-click menu.
- Added: "Open/Create Folder Note" option in the folder's right-click menu.
- Added: "Open Backlinks" command.
- Added: "Random Note" mode.
- Added: Settings to toggle various modes on/off.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- New: Reuse Existing Grid View
  You can now choose to reuse an existing Grid View instead of always creating a new one.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Add a command to open current note in GridView
- Add parent folder
- Fixed the flickering problem when switching pictures

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Added a button to open Folder Notes in the folder item.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Thumbnail support for [[image.jpg]] link format.
- Added settings for opening location.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: fix

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added various settings for the Grid view
- Added support for searching only the current folder

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Added the ability to ignore folders and files by entering a string.
- Added a shortcut to go back to the parent folder.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Support displaying images and videos
- Support keyboard navigation
- Add the ability to drag and drop files

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- When selecting a folder on mobile devices, the focus is no longer placed in the input box by default.
- Attempted to improve performance.
- The file monitoring feature can now be enabled/disabled in the settings.

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description:
- Add folder filtering functionality
- Allow folder selection using the keyboard

releases.author: Devon22
releases.description: - Support for older versions of Obsidian
